title: Announcing Claude Compliance API support with Cloudflare CASB
summary:
**AI-Generated Summary**: This is an automated summary of a Cloudflare blog post created using AI. For the full details and context, please read the original post.

**Cloudflare Extends CASB Support to Claude Compliance API**

Cloudflare has announced the integration of its Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB) with the Claude Compliance API, enabling security and compliance teams to monitor Claude usage directly in the Cloudflare dashboard without requiring endpoint agents. This integration addresses the growing need for visibility and control over AI applications, which have become increasingly complex and difficult to secure.

**Key Technical Details**

The Claude Compliance API provides programmatic access to security-relevant data about Claude usage, allowing organizations to regain visibility and control over their investments in AI applications. Cloudflare CASB will scan for misconfigurations and sensitive data within Claude, using lightweight API integrations to connect to, scan, and monitor third-party SaaS applications. This unified approach enables administrators to enforce rate limits, cache responses, and make fine-grained routing decisions, while also logging every request for audit.

**Practical Implications for Developers**

This integration will help developers and security teams to:

* Gain visibility into AI application usage and behavior
* Identify and mitigate security risks associated with AI tools
* Enforce rate limits and caching responses to optimize performance
* Make fine-grained routing decisions to optimize traffic flow
* Log every request for audit and compliance purposes

By extending its CASB support to the Claude Compliance API, Cloudflare is providing a comprehensive security solution for organizations deploying AI applications at scale.
